get.description:
Returns all active banner sections ordered by sort_order,
each with their active banners (including signed image URLs).

Category page: GET /api/v1/{category-slug}
Brand page:    GET /api/v1/{brand-slug}

Filters (comma-separated multi-value for attributes):
  ?brand=samsung,lg               – one or more brands (on category page)
  ?category=televisions,monitors  – one or more categories (on brand page)
  ?screen-size=55,65      – attribute filter (comma-separated)
  ?min_price=50000        – minimum effective price
  ?max_price=300000       – maximum effective price
  ?on_sale=1              – only products with sale_price
  ?in_stock=1             – only in-stock products
  ?sort=price_asc|price_desc|newest|oldest|popular|featured
  ?per_page=20            – items per page (max 100)

get.summary:
GET /collections
Returns all active collections ordered by sort_order (no products, metadata + banner only)

get.description:
Query params:
  sort      = latest (default) | best_selling | top_rated
  per_page  = 20 (max 100)
  page      = 1

get.summary:
Prompt the user to verify their email address.
Named route: verification.notice

Mark the authenticated user's email address as verified.
Named route: verification.verify
Accessible via signed URL (no Sanctum token needed)

post.summary:
Resend the email verification notification.
Named route: verification.send

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
